creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #6)


Hi Fernando,

Thanks for the patch.

The latest code as of 2-3 weeks ago had 2 regressions with audio not playing in the "Local" mode.

So I will hold off with the update for now until I would be able to confirm that these have been fixed.


Thanks again,
Yuri
